title: Eddie DeDomenico endorses Incorruptible
summary: Eddie DeDomenico read an advance copy.
blockquote: I've been really caught up the past two years in a fear of scale. I'm fearful of it because I'm responsible for helping my digital creator clients incubate products…and we all know the story: a company grows and loses its soul.
attribution_title: Digital Talent Manager and Business Strategist, Range Media Partners
